test.note: 9 files failing, 2 tests failing — matches pre-existing baseline (AGENTS.md documents 9 files, 2 tests as pre-existing). 441 tests passing across 52 files.

lint.note: 769 problems (704 errors, 65 warnings) — all pre-existing across legacy files. No new lint errors introduced by misc-cleanup-1 features.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'Cleanup/migration tasks must not create new component files. Scope is limited to modifying existing files per the task description. New components require a separate feature.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature color-hex-cleanup created 4 entirely new component files (CustomEdge.tsx, PlaybackToolbar.tsx, ConnectionHandle.tsx, NodeStatusIndicator.tsx — 544 lines total) during a color migration task. None are imported anywhere — pure dead code representing scope creep.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand Color Scheme section to note: 'When migrating green, also check for green-tinted dark background colors (e.g., rgba(18,24,20), #19231c) and migrate them to warm dark equivalents (e.g., rgba(26,21,16), #1d1a15).'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: ShotsRow.tsx has 2 green-tinted dark background values (bg-[rgba(18,24,20,0.92)] and hover:bg-[#19231c]) that were missed during color migration because AGENTS.md only documents accent color migration, not subtle background tints.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker correctly skipped test-writing and browser verification steps for cosmetic color migration, documenting deviations in skillFeedback. Suggestion that skill procedure could note cosmetic tasks can skip these steps.
rejectedObservations.reason: Skill procedure change — but the existing skill flexibility via deviations is working correctly. Not a systemic issue needing procedure change.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md now documents mandatory authenticateRequest() for edge functions — this convention was already applied between project-setup scrutiny and this fix.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — the convention is already in place in AGENTS.md.

rejectedObservations.observation: useProjectSettingsStore persist middleware may serve stale cached data between mount and fetch resolution, affecting credit display accuracy.
rejectedObservations.reason: Pre-existing architectural concern outside the scope of this milestone's cleanup. The fix feature correctly uses the store as designed. This is a potential future improvement, not a scrutiny finding.
